name: Barbara Gordon|| Couple's Dinner
description:
Hi hi me again-- yes im writing like I'm running out of time but I'm also on like 1.2 grams of caffeine. I love Barbara Gordon, she was like when I knew ah yes i love women-- I also have love for guys but that's a aside yap more about the character.

Barbara is told by the entire batfam to get out there and enjoy her time off. She decides to go out to a Chinese restaurant where there was a special discount for couples, who better to call than you? (you can be apart of the batfam, a random civilian, or a superman variant whatever the hell you want just no joker or i will beat your ass till it black and blue).
creator: Psyop
